codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 8f9d73e and the resulting token/CSS files against the mission feature spec. The implementation satisfies the requested scope: src/index.css still defines the 16 core color tokens and 5 font stacks with the expected primary fonts, src/ui/tokens.ts exports the requested 16/7/5/4/5 token manifest, and the glass surface classes now use token variables for background and border while .gp-glass keeps the required blur+saturate backdrop-filter with the -webkit- prefix. I did not find any concrete blocking or non-blocking implementation defects in the reviewed scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-redesign skill appears too strict for small design-token/data-manifest tasks: it requires invoking frontend-design at session start and a RED-first test cycle, but this worker completed the feature without that extra design-skill hop and explicitly noted the RED-first guidance was unnecessary for a trivial manifest module.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\skills\frontend-redesign\SKILL.md:21 says to invoke frontend-design at the start, and lines 41-45 require a RED-first cycle. The worker transcript skeleton for session 944093ce-7fa9-45d1-9862-03fc5ae6f00f shows mission-worker-base and frontend-redesign tool usage but no frontend-design invocation, and the handoff file C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\handoffs\2026-04-10T13-04-45-506Z__foundation-design-tokens__944093ce-7fa9-45d1-9862-03fc5ae6f00f.json records the worker's suggested skill change for pure data/config modules.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The token-manifest test only self-validates the TypeScript manifest; it does not assert that src/ui/tokens.ts stays in sync with src/index.css. Reviewing this feature still required manual CSS inspection to confirm the theme tokens and glass-class source match the contract.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\src\ui\tokens.test.ts:16-37, 55-81, and 121-127 only inspect tokens.* objects and key arrays. The feature contract in C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\features.json:330-347 separately requires CSS-side token presence and glass-class source checks, so future CSS/manifest drift would not be caught by the current token test alone.

summary: Pass. The design-token feature matches its requested behavior, and I found no actionable code defects in commit 8f9d73e.
